PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
    PsiElement(CASE)('case')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('ensure')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''present'')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
            PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('archive')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
                PsiElement({)('{')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('destination')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(:)(':')
                  PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                  PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
                    PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
                      PsiWhiteSpace('       ')
                      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('present')
                    PsiElement(,)(',')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                    PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('source')
                      PsiWhiteSpace('       ')
                      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
                        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                          PsiElement($)('$')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('oracle_url')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                          PsiElement($)('$')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('release_major')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('-')
                        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                          PsiElement($)('$')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('release_minor')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('/')
                        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                          PsiElement($)('$')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('package_name')
                          PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
                    PsiElement(,)(',')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                    PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('cleanup')
                      PsiWhiteSpace('      ')
                      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetExpressionFalseImpl(EXPRESSION_FALSE)
                        PsiElement(FALSE)('false')
                    PsiElement(,)(',')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                    PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('extract_path')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/tmp'')
                    PsiElement(,)(',')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                    PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('cookie')
                      PsiWhiteSpace('       ')
                      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''gpw_e24=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.oracle.com%2F; oraclelicense=accept-securebackup-cookie'')
                    PsiElement(,)(',')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
                PsiElement(})('}')
            PsiElement(->)('->')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
            PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
              PsiElement(CASE)('case')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('::kernel')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
                PsiElement({)('{')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
                  PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
                    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Linux'')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(:)(':')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
                    PsiElement({)('{')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n          ')
                    PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('exec')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
                        PsiElement({)('{')
                        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                        Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
                          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                            PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"Install Oracle java_se ')
                            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                              PsiElement($)('$')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('java_se')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                            PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' ')
                            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                              PsiElement($)('$')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('version')
                              PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                            PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
                          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                          PsiElement(:)(':')
                          PsiWhiteSpace('\n            ')
                          PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
                            PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                                PsiElement(NAME)('path')
                              PsiWhiteSpace('    ')
                              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                                PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/bin:/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin'')
                            PsiElement(,)(',')
                            PsiWhiteSpace('\n            ')
                            PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                                PsiElement(NAME)('command')
                              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                                PsiElement($)('$')
                                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('install_command')
                            PsiElement(,)(',')
                            PsiWhiteSpace('\n            ')
                            PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
                              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                                PsiElement(NAME)('creates')
                              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                              PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                                PsiElement($)('$')
                                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('creates_path')
                            PsiElement(,)(',')
                        PsiWhiteSpace('\n          ')
                        PsiElement(})('}')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                    PsiElement(})('}')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
                  PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
                    PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
                      PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiElement(:)(':')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
                    PsiElement({)('{')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n          ')
                    PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
                      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                        PsiElement(NAME)('fail')
                      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                      PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                        PsiElement(()('(')
                        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"unsupported platform ')
                          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                            PsiElement($)('$')
                            PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('::kernel')
                            PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('"')
                        PsiElement())(')')
                    PsiWhiteSpace('\n        ')
                    PsiElement(})('}')
                PsiWhiteSpace('\n      ')
                PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
        PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
          PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"Action ')
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('ensure')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)(' not supported."')
              PsiElement())(')')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
